videos.headline: Virginia ties games late in 4th as Eli Wood snags a huge TD
videos.description: Eli Wood makes a magnificent snag to tie the score with under 30 seconds left in regulation for Virginia.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Virginia ties games late in 4th as Eli Wood snags a huge TD) 2025/12/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Diaz: Duke 'deserves' to be ACC champions
videos.description: Duke football coach Manny Diaz speaks after Duke's overtime win vs. Virginia for the ACC championship.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Interview (Diaz: Duke 'deserves' to be ACC champions) 2025/12/07 ESHEET
